subcodes.first_line: O Leaf! God willing, mayest thou be detached from creation and hold fast unto the Truth. This Day all ties are severed, for [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ورقه انشاء الله از خلق منقطع و بحق متمسک باشی الیوم نسبتها مقطوعست چه که
subcodes.subjects: @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @love of God
